description: The 'Ndrina Molè is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Gioia Tauro plain, Italy. Originally allied with the Piromalli clan, it controlled drug trafficking in the area from the 1980s-1990s, dealing cannabis and cocaine from Colombian cartels. The clan was heavily targeted in the 1993 operation Tirreno, leading to numerous arrests. In the 2000s, it split from the Piromalli and faced further law enforcement operations.

country_links.evidence_quote: paesi esteri come Argentina , Francia , Germania e Svizzera
country_links.context: The Molè clan had contacts with Argentina as part of their drug trafficking network.
